_meta.author: isaiahbjork
_meta.title: Warning Graphic
_meta.description: This component renders an animated SVG warning graphic with a triangle, exclamation mark, stripes, and path outlines, using framer-motion for a layered entrance sequence with configurable animation speed and color. It supports motion-reduction detection, progressive draw effects, and modular fade/scale transitions for accessibility and customization. Perfect for alert banners, system status messages, onboarding visuals, HUD, sci-fi or gaming themes, or any UI needing a bold, animated warning indicator.
